titleStmt.title: SII 16.123: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 123. (A.R. No. 303 of 1905.) PUSHPAGIRI, CUDDAPAH TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up at the southern gōpura, right of entrance of the Vaidyanāthasvāmin temple.
The record is dated Śaka 1463, Plava, Vaiśākha śu. 3, Thursday regularly corresponding to 1541 A.D., April 28, Thursday, °95.

Registers a sarvamānya gift of the incomes from the four villages, Etūru, Miḍutūru, Saruṁpalli and Gaṅgavaram, belonging to the Vaidyanātha temple, Kōṭavallūru belonging to the Aghōraśivāchārya-maṭha and Pinamāchupalle and a third portion of Pāpāreḍḍipalle belonging to the Channakēśava temple, to Aghōrasivāchāryula Chennappa and sthānam Peda Ōbayya and Pina-Ōbayya, the sthānikas of the Vaidyanātha and the Chennakēśava temples at Pushpagiri by Daḷavāyi Timarusayya, son of Chandragiri Sōmarusayya, stipulating that the annual sum of 60 varāha gadyas payable as Ghaṇḍikōṭadurga-varttana by these villages be set apart for regular worship and offerings in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipataĒ namaḥ . śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana
śakavarṣaṁbulu 1463 Agunēṭi plavasaṁvatsara vaiśākha śu 3 gu śrīmadrā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa Acyutadēvamahārāya
lu vijayanagaramaṁdu vajraśiṁhvāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛthivirājyamu śē
yucuṁḍagānu Acyutadēvamahārāyala daḷavāyi . caṁdragiri sō
marusayya putṛṁḍu timarusayyavāru . puṣpagiri vaIdyunāthacenna kēśva
radēvaḷa stānikulu Aghōraśivācāryula cennappānu sthānaṁ pedavōbayya
pinavōbayyagāriki yiccina sarvamānyapu dha(r)rmaśāsana kramameṭlannanū
vayidyanāthaniki celyēṭi grāmālu . Ēṭūru miḍutūru sarunupalya
gaṁgavaraṁ yī nālugugrāmālunnu Aghōraśivācāryulaku
celyē maṭagrāmaṁ kōṭavallūrunu cennaThe writing here is deliberately erased.
kēśvaruni grāmālu pinanūcupalya . 1 ni pāpāreḍḍi palyalōni tṛtī
yāṁśamuna yī grāmālalōThe writing here is deliberately erased.
ni stānaprāptulunnu mīru Anubhaviṁci dēvatāgrāmālaku gha
ṁḍikōṭa durgavartana yeṁḍo 1 ki va ga 60 varahālu peṭṭi mīru
dēvatāśēva Aṁgaraṁgavaibhavālu tīrthatiruṇāḷu śēIṁcukoni vuṁ
ḍuvāru yī dharmmānaku ghaṁḍikōṭadurgaṁ yēlēṭivāru yavva
ru tappi rūkapātikilu konnānu tama tallitaṁḍrini vāraṇāśilōnu
vadhiṁcina pāpānaṁ bōyinavāru . gaṁgakartanu gōvubrāṁhma
ni vadhiṁcina pāpānaṁ bōyinavāru Ani yiccina sarvamānya
pu dha(r)rmaśāsanaṁ svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupāla
naṁ . paradattāpaharēṇa (.) svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . dānapālana
yōrmmadhyē . dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāt svargamavāpnōti .
pālanā dacyutaṁ padaṁ ß maṁgaḷamāśrīśrīśrī jēyu
nū [.]
Digital edition of SII 16.123 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
